columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The date and time of the DLP event, expressed as a UTC-formatted string.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: The type of event that matched a data identifier. Real Time denotes a proxy-based DLP event triggered by a Real Time rule and SaaS API denotes a DLP event triggered by any of the SaaS API rules.

columns.name: UniqueEventId
columns.description: The unique identifier for the event. There can be multiple violation matches in one event.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: The severity of the rule: Low/Info, Medium/Warn, High/Alert, or Critical.

columns.name: Identity
columns.description: The source that triggered the violation.

columns.name: Owner
columns.description: The owner of the file.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: The name of the file.

columns.name: Application
columns.description: The application of the request.

columns.name: Destination
columns.description: The domain of the request.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: If the violation was Blocked or Monitored.

columns.name: Rule
columns.description: The DLP rule name.

columns.name: DataClassification
columns.description: The data classification whose data identifier matched on the violation.

columns.name: DataIdentifier
columns.description: The data identifier that matched on the request.

columns.name: ContentType
columns.description: The mime type of the file that matches the data identifier.

columns.name: FileSize
columns.description: The size of the file in bytes.

columns.name: Sha256Hash
columns.description: The hex digest of the response content.

columns.name: FileLabel
columns.description: The file name label that matched on the file properties.

columns.name: ApplicationCategoryName
columns.description: The category of the requested web application.

columns.name: TrafficDirection
columns.description: Direction of traffic. (Applies only to some applications, such as OpenAI API and OpenAI ChatGPT.)

columns.name: PrivateResourceName
columns.description: The name of the private resource.

columns.name: PrivateResourceGroupName
columns.description: The private resource group name if the matched rule destination was a private resource group.

columns.name: DestinationProtocol
columns.description: The protocol of the destination.

columns.name: DestinationIp
columns.description: The IP address of the destination.

columns.name: DestinationPort
columns.description: The port of the destination.

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: The Secure Access organization ID.
